Premium

Executive Health Program

Comprehensive health screening designed for busy professionals. Full-body assessment, personalized health report, and ongoing wellness monitoring — all in one visit.

✓ Complete blood work & cardiac screening
✓ Advanced imaging (CT, MRI available)
✓ Same-day results with specialist consultation
✓ Bilingual report (Arabic & English)
Book Executive Screening →

🫁

👁️
Vision Screening
🦴

🧬
